pageDesc: Manage system-wide policies and environment configuration.

general.systemNameDesc: The name of the platform displayed in the UI and reports.
general.displayLangDesc:
Select the language for the system UI.
Takes effect immediately after saving.
general.timezoneDesc: The standard time zone used for data collection and logging.
general.sessionTimeoutDesc: Time before automatic logout due to inactivity.
general.maxLoginAttemptsDesc: Maximum failed login attempts allowed before account lockout.

database.retentionDaysDesc: Maximum number of days to retain collected telemetry data in the DB.
database.autoBackupDesc: Regularly back up the database according to the system schedule.
database.backupScheduleDesc: Set the frequency at which backups are performed.
database.backupRetentionDesc: Duration to keep generated backup files.

collection.defaultPollingDesc: Default data collection interval when no device-specific setting exists.
collection.maxConcurrentDesc: Maximum number of device sessions the server can handle simultaneously.
collection.deviceTimeoutDesc: Time before a non-responding device is considered timed out.
collection.influxIntervalDesc:
Interval for saving time-series data for historical queries
(set to 0 to save immediately on scan).

notifications.emailEnabledDesc: Send email alerts for system failures and key events.
notifications.smtpServerDesc: Host name of the SMTP mail server used for sending notifications.
notifications.fromNameDesc: The sender name shown to recipients.
notifications.smsEnabledDesc: Send urgent alerts via SMS server.
notifications.pushEnabledDesc: Send real-time push notifications to mobile devices.
notifications.cooldownDesc: Minimum time to suppress duplicate notifications.

security.minLengthDesc: Minimum number of characters required for user passwords.
security.expiryDaysDesc: Period after which users must change their password for security.
security.twoFactorDesc: Require two-factor authentication (OTP) for all admin accounts.
security.auditLogDesc: Record all configuration changes and key user actions in detail.

performance.cpuThresholdDesc: Trigger a system warning when CPU usage exceeds this value.
performance.memoryThresholdDesc: Notify admin when physical memory usage exceeds threshold.
performance.diskThresholdDesc: Data collection may stop if disk usage exceeds this setting.
performance.cacheEnabledDesc: Use in-memory cache for faster responses on frequently queried data.

logging.logLevelDesc: Set the verbosity level for system logs to record.
logging.retentionDaysDesc: Retention period before old logs are deleted.
logging.maxFileSizeDesc: Maximum size allowed for individual log files.
logging.packetLoggingDesc: Record raw packet data sent and received to log files.

saveErrorDetail: An error occurred while saving settings: {{message}}
resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore all settings to defaults?

status.pageDesc: Monitor all service statuses of the industrial data hub in real time.
status.collectorDesc: Each edge server's data collection engine operates independently.
status.noCollectors: No collectors assigned to this site.
status.unregisteredProcess: UNREGISTERED PROCESS (Detected but not in DB)
status.errServerComm: Error while communicating with the server.
